action.content:
Name geometric shapes from their SVG paths.

Q: This SVG path element <path d="M 31.00,73.00 L 32.00,59.00 L 44.00,50.00 L 49.00,41.00 L 64.00,37.00 L 71.00,55.00 L 64.00,76.00 L 52.00,61.00 L 31.00,73.00"/> draws a
Options:
(A) circle
(B) heptagon
(C) hexagon
(D) kite
(E) line
(F) octagon
(G) pentagon
(H) rectangle
(I) sector
(J) triangle
A: (F)

Q: This SVG path element <path d="M 14.19,26.04 L 51.43,39.21 L 58.44,36.69 L 56.63,30.17 L 48.53,26.66 L 14.19,26.04"/> draws a
Options:
(A) circle
(B) heptagon
(C) hexagon
(D) kite
(E) line
(F) octagon
(G) pentagon
(H) rectangle
(I) sector
(J) triangle
A: (G)

Q: This SVG path element <path d="M 41.00,43.00 L 37.00,34.00 L 41.00,33.00 L 45.00,34.00 L 41.00,43.00"/> draws a
Options:
(A) circle
(B) heptagon
(C) hexagon
(D) kite
(E) line
(F) octagon
(G) pentagon
(H) rectangle
(I) sector
(J) triangle
A: (D)

Q: This SVG path element <path d="M 31.14,30.62 L 27.61,16.81 L 36.59,14.51 L 44.38,16.20 L 49.10,26.03 L 38.64,42.68 L 22.16,32.91 L 31.14,30.62"/> draws a
Options:
(A) circle
(B) heptagon
(C) hexagon
(D) kite
(E) line
(F) octagon
(G) pentagon
(H) rectangle
(I) sector
(J) triangle
A:
action.label: context

action.content:
To determine the geometric shape, we need to count the number of distinct vertices (points) defined in the SVG path. The path commands are `M` (Move to) and `L` (Line to).

The path is:
`M 31.14,30.62` (Point 1)
`L 27.61,16.81` (Point 2)
`L 36.59,14.51` (Point 3)
`L 44.38,16.20` (Point 4)
`L 49.10,26.03` (Point 5)
`L 38.64,42.68` (Point 6)
`L 22.16,32.91` (Point 7)
`L 31.14,30.62` (Returns to Point 1, closing the shape)

There are 7 distinct vertices. A polygon with 7 sides and 7 vertices is called a **heptagon**.

Therefore, the correct option is (B).

A: (B)
action.label: response
